title: DescribeWorkingStorageOutput
description: A JSON object containing the following fields:

allOf.description: An array of the gateway's local disk IDs that are configured as working storage. Each local disk ID is specified as a string (minimum length of 1 and maximum length of 300). If no local disks are configured as working storage, then the DiskIds array is empty.
The total working storage in bytes in use by the gateway. If no working storage is configured for the gateway, this field returns 0.
The total working storage in bytes allocated for the gateway. If no working storage is configured for the gateway, this field returns 0.
